noProjectsHint: Create your first project to get started
rpSecretsEmpty:
No secrets.
Create a file in the
rpFooter:
Click an element
to insert at cursor
deleteProjectMsg: Project and all files will be deleted.
errNoMount: No available multi-mode mount point for project creation. Add an empty folder to COMPOSE_MOUNTS.
errCantDeleteDirect: Cannot delete direct-mode project (it is a mounted folder).

dclintDescriptions.no-build-and-image: Each service must use either build or image, not both.
dclintDescriptions.no-quotes-in-volumes: Values in volumes section should not be enclosed in quotes.
dclintDescriptions.no-unbound-port-interfaces: Exported ports must be bound to specific interfaces.
dclintDescriptions.no-version-field: The version field must be absent.
dclintDescriptions.require-project-name-field: The name field should be included.
dclintDescriptions.require-quotes-in-ports: Ports in ports and expose sections should be enclosed in quotes.
dclintDescriptions.service-container-name-regex: Container names must match Docker naming conventions.
dclintDescriptions.service-dependencies-alphabetical-order: Services in depends_on should be sorted alphabetically.
dclintDescriptions.service-image-require-explicit-tag: Services must use a specific image tag.
dclintDescriptions.service-keys-order: Keys within each service should follow a specific order.
dclintDescriptions.service-ports-alphabetical-order: Ports in a service should be sorted alphabetically.
dclintDescriptions.top-level-properties-order: Top-level properties should follow a specific order.

dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" is using both: Service "{serviceName}" is using both "build" and "image". Use one of them, but not both.
dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" has a duplicat: Service "{serviceName}" has a duplicate container name "{containerName}" with service "{anotherService}". Container names MUST BE unique.
dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" is exporting p: Service "{serviceName}" is exporting port "{publishedPort}" which is already used by service "{anotherService}".
dclintMessages.Quotes should not be used in volume name: Quotes should not be used in volume names.
dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" is exporting p: Service "{serviceName}" is exporting port "{port}" without specifying the interface to listen on.
dclintMessages.The \"version\" field should not be pres: The "version" field should not be present.
dclintMessages.Ports in `ports` and `expose` sections s: Ports in `ports` and `expose` sections should be enclosed in quotes.
dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" has an invalid: Service "{serviceName}" has an invalid container name "{containerName}". It must match the regex pattern {regex}.
dclintMessages.Services in \"depends_on\" for service \: Services in "depends_on" for service "{serviceName}" should be in alphabetical order.
dclintMessages.Service \"{serviceName}\" is using the i: Service "{serviceName}" is using the image "{image}", which does not have a concrete version tag. Specify a concrete version tag.
dclintMessages.Key \"{key}\" in service \"{serviceName}: Key "{key}" in service "{serviceName}" is out of order. Expected order is: {correctOrder}.
dclintMessages.Ports in service \"{serviceName}\" shoul: Ports in service "{serviceName}" should be in alphabetical order.
dclintMessages.Property \"{key}\" is out of order. Expe: Property "{key}" is out of order. Expected order is: {correctOrder}.
dclintMessages.Nested mappings are not allowed in compa: Nested mappings are not allowed in compact mappings
dclintMessages.All sequence items must start at the sam: All sequence items must start at the same column
dclintMessages.Implicit keys need to be on a single lin: Implicit keys need to be on a single line
dclintMessages.A block sequence may not be used as an i: A block sequence may not be used as an implicit map key
dclintMessages.Tabs are not allowed as indentation: Tabs are not allowed as indentation

allFilesWillBeDeleted: All project files will be permanently deleted.
errCidrTooLarge: CIDR range is too large. Maximum allowed is /20 (4096 hosts)./
name: Name
errRegInvalid: Invalid input. Username and password must be at least 6 characters.
